title: dendranthema argyrophyllum
intro: Dendranthema argyrophyllum, also known as the silver-leaved chrysanthemum, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Dendranthema argyrophyllum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, or in combination with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
